Package com.gpudb.protocol

Class ShowTableResponse.TableDescriptions

java.lang.Object
com.gpudb.protocol.ShowTableResponse.TableDescriptions
Enclosing class:
ShowTableResponse
public static final class ShowTableResponse.TableDescriptions extends Object
A set of string constants for the ShowTableResponse parameter tableDescriptions.

List of descriptions for the respective tables in tableNames.
